{{CargoRelic
|name=Woman with a Parasol
|class_id=21139
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Monet’s impressionist hymn to fleeting light. Wind-kissed skirts and fractured brushstrokes birthed "living palette" technique.
|fame=47
|art=108
|fth=85
|civ=67
|tech=55
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Oblivion Power +3<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Murky Power +3<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Oblivion Power +4<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Murky Power +4<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Oblivion Power +5<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Murky Power +5<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Oblivion Power +7<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Murky Power +7<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Oblivion Power +9<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Murky Power +9<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Oblivion Power +12<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Murky Power +12<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Oblivion Power +12<br>Per 3 Dorm Decors gained, Snail Murky Power +12<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 150/150<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, B-tads gained +6%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's ART +15
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Card Drops +6%
}}
